paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 124 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 111 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 46 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 17. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **35 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $29,795 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 42 days past due with 17 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **30 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $36,338 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 32 days past due with 17 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 15. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **46 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $32,253 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 13. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 44 days past due with 10 total — this has been stuck for days. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $19,981 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 10. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **56 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Karim-Merchant:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 7. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **12 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 8 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **50 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 18 days past due with 7 total — this has been stuck for days. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **17 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue for multiple days running — no progress. This needs a direct conversation with the PM. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $17,354 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 24 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

344 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **306 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 14 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$128,667 in payments going out this week** across 65 tasks — make sure funds are available. $27,683 expected in from 3 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 24. This needs to turn around today.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 13 overdue — oldest first. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 13 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 8 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **50 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 59 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue stuck for days — needs direct action, not just monitoring. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 14 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Giselle Garcia: Giselle Garcia is carrying 34 overdue, higher than their recent average. Time to clear the backlog.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 17 overdue — oldest first. **35 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 43 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 10 overdue — oldest first. **56 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 56 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Karim-Merchant:** 7 overdue — oldest first. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **12 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 12 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is carrying 32 overdue, higher than their recent average. Time to clear the backlog.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 17 overdue (oldest: 42d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **30 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 15 overdue — oldest first. **46 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 46 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jonas De Cardenas: Jonas De Cardenas is completely clean — no overdue tasks. Keep this up.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas has 10 overdue across 1 project with 4 tasks active.

**Ginger Brown:** 10 overdue (oldest: 44d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **19 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 32 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
